spec.name: The Half-Dry Drain
spec.description: You are in a half-dry sewer drain. To the north the drain runs a little bit downwards into some water to the east you can see a small hole. To the west you see another drain.

north.description: You see the drain running down into some water.

east.description: Through the hole you can just make out a very small room.

west.description: You see a drain running to the west.

extra_descs.description: The water is dirty but it looks like you would be able to swim in it.
Through the hole you can just make out a very small room.
